title: French Flaky Kissed Bread Galette
description: Garlicky, fluffy French bread from Alsace, perfect for breakfast or lunch.
instructions: Combine bread flour and yeast in a large mixing bowl, whisking to combine.
Gradually add cold water, smoked salt, granulated sugar, and minced garlic, mixing until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and let rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Punch down the dough and roll it out to a 1/4-inch thickness.
Transfer the dough to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Cut the dough into a rough rectangle, then fold it into a triangle, pressing the edges to seal.
Cut small slits in the top crust to allow steam to escape.
Bake the galette for 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and brush with softened butter, then sprinkle with poppy seeds.
Let the galette cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
